info.name: DepEd Leave Management API
info.description: API collection for the DepEd Leave Management System

request.description: Returns all leave balances for a specific employee, joined with leave type details (code, name, balance_type). Returns an empty data array if the employee has no balances yet.
Credits VL or SL days to an employee's balance. leave_type_id must correspond to VL (id=1) or SL (id=2). Inserts a CREDIT into the ledger and updates the cached balance.

Submits a leave application. Validates employee balance based on leave type rules:
- SELF (VL, SL, SPL): checks own balance
- CHARGED_TO_VL (FL): checks both FL entitlement and VL balance
- NONE (ML, PL, etc.): no balance check
Application is created as PENDING. Balance is NOT deducted yet.
Retrieves a single leave application by its primary key, including employee name and leave type details.
Retrieves all leave applications submitted by a specific employee, ordered by date filed descending.

Processes an approver decision on a PENDING leave application.
- APPROVED: records approval, posts DEBIT to ledger, deducts from balance cache
- REJECTED: records rejection, marks application as REJECTED
status must be APPROVED or REJECTED. Application must be PENDING.
Retrieves all approval records for a specific leave application, ordered by approval level ascending.
Submits a CTO application documenting an activity/event rendered. Created as PENDING. CTO credit is NOT posted until approved.

Processes an APPROVED or REJECTED decision on a PENDING CTO application.\nOn APPROVED: posts a CREDIT to leave_credit_transactions (source_type=SPECIAL_ORDER) and updates the employee CTO balance cache.\nOn REJECTED: records the rejection only.
Retrieves a single CTO application by its primary key including employee details.
Retrieves all CTO applications submitted by a specific employee, ordered by creation date descending.
Returns all leave types ordered by code. Includes code, name, balance_type (SELF / CHARGED_TO_VL / NONE), and is_active flag.
Returns paginated ledger transactions (CREDIT and DEBIT) for a specific employee, ordered by transaction date descending. Includes leave type code and name.
